title: A South Hadley override vote made national headlines. Here’s why.
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News The Western Mass.
town is reckoning with deep cuts after residents rejected proposals for either a $9 million or $11 million override.
South Hadley voters on Tuesday rejected a controversial proposal to hike property taxes by 50% amid a looming budget deficit.
